title: Bushier Flowers
description: Bushier Flowers: Farm Flowers & Dyes Or Make Bouquets! [Fabric/Forge]
body: ## Bushier Flowers is a Forge and Fabric client- and serverside mod that adds bushier variants to the vanilla flower types. ### ❱ Multiple Flowers inside one Block with different models and offsets ﹂ simply _right-click_ Vanilla Flowers with Bonemeal. ### ❱ Farming Flowers and Dyes ﹂ Grown Flowers drop _2 of their respective Vanilla Flower_ when broken or bonemealed or craft Grown Flowers into Dye! ### ❱ Automation of Farming ﹂ _Dispensers duplicate Vanilla Flowers_ now like the double tall ones! ### ❱ Decorating with Bouquets: Pot, gift or replant them! ﹂ Grown Flowers can be mined with _Silk Touch or Shears to receive a Bouquet._ ### ❱ Bee-friendly ﹂ Grown Flowers can be used to _pollinate and breed bees_ as you're used to! ### ❱ Fancier World Generation: Flowerbeds ﹂ _Grown Flowers spawn in dense patches_ and freshen up your world with color! ### ❱ Resourcepack-Compatible! ﹂ Bushier flowers use textures of the currently active resourcepack! ![Screenshot of 1/2 of the grown vanilla-flowers](https://i.imgur.com/v3ShkWb.jpg) ![Screenshot of 2/2 of the grown vanilla-flowers](https://i.imgur.com/jCmU39i.jpg) ![Worldgeneration with bushier flowers](https://i.imgur.com/OxN1MBH.png) ![Get 25% off a Minecraft Server using code "Pandarix" at Bisechosting.com](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/9ff4882b-bc4b-4ae3-a45f-c2d388846cc1.png) Inspiration: This mod is inspired by the YouTuber GoodTimesWithScar who suggested that vanilla flowers just don't quite do it. And I totally agree! Mod Featured in: Valhelsia 5, The Botanists Journey
